name: IGH_ContextualParameter
summary: Base interface for contextual parameters. This makes accessing non-strongly-typed functionality easier.

methods.name: AssignContextualData
methods.summary: Assign a collection of values as contextual data.

params.name: data
params.doc: Data to assign. Should be of expected type.

methods.name: AutoAssignContextualData
methods.summary: Use the in-build getter UI to assign data to the parameter.

properties.name: AtLeast
properties.summary: Minimum number of inputs to request

properties.name: AtMost
properties.summary: Maximum number of inputs to request.

properties.name: ContextualData
properties.summary: Iterate over all specified contextual values.

properties.name: Immediate
properties.summary: Gets whether this parameter triggers immediate updates from inside its getter. Immediacy is important for a smooth experience, but it maybe disabled if the expected recalculation time becomes excessive.

properties.name: Prompt
properties.summary: Gets the prompt to be displayed while asking the user to enter data. The prompt string may contain '{0}' fields which will be populated with the amount of values picked so far.
